record.field: partner_ids = record.x_hiring_team_contact_ids.ids if record.x_hiring_team_contact_ids else [] action = env['portal.wizard'].with_context(default_partner_ids=partner_ids).action_open_wizard()

action = { 'type': 'ir.actions.act_window', 'res_model': 'mail.compose.message', 'view_mode': 'form', 'views': [(env.ref('mail.email_compose_message_wizard_form').id, 'form')], 'target': 'new', 'context': { 'default_model': 'hr.applicant', 'default_res_ids': [record.id], 'default_template_id': env.ref('headhunter.mail_template_60').id, 'default_composition_mode': 'comment', 'default_attachment_ids': [(6, 0, record.x_shared_cv_ids.ids)], 'force_email': True, 'x_from_cv_send': True, 'default_partner_ids': [(6, 0, [record.job_id.x_customer_id.id])] if record.job_id.x_customer_id else [], } }

if env.context.get('x_from_cv_send'): applicant = env['hr.applicant'].browse(record.res_id) applicant.x_shared_cv_ids.write({'public': True}) env['x_cv_sent_application'].create({ 'x_applicant_id': applicant.id, 'x_job_id': applicant.job_id.id, 'x_cv_ids': [(6, 0, record.attachment_ids.ids)], 'x_available': applicant.x_available, 'x_availability': applicant.availability, 'x_cv_sent_date': datetime.date.today(), }) applicant['x_is_cv_sent'] = True, applicant['x_published'] = True,

job_ids = records.x_job_position_ids.ids domain = [('job_id', 'in', job_ids), ('x_is_cv_sent', '=', True)] action = { 'type': 'ir.actions.act_window', 'name': 'Sent CVs', 'res_model': 'hr.applicant', 'view_mode': 'list,form', 'domain': domain, 'context': {'group_by': 'job_id'}, }
